name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: What a week for the Cruz Campaign!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

As you've likely seen by now, on Monday, March 23rd, Senator Ted Cruz kicked off his candidacy for the Republican nomination for President of the United States with a video on Twitter <https://twitter.com/tedcruz/status/579857596191899648> shortly after midnight. Just a few hours later, he delivered his announcement speech <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ujW071RLYNg> at Liberty University which was described by the Wall Street Journal's Peggy Noonan as "really brilliant" and one that is "giving future contenders announcement envy."

In a tremendous outpouring of support from thousands of donors and supporters, less than 24 hours after the speech at Liberty, the Cruz for President campaign had already raised well over a million dollars. And within three days, we'd raised over $2 million.

Sen. Cruz has a packed schedule of campaign stops across Iowa and South Carolina this week to rally our campaign to reignite the promise of America.

When we win this race, it will be because of supporters such as yourself, and I look forward to keeping you up to date and working alongside you in the coming months.

All the best,
Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

National Review Online <http://www.nationalreview.com/articles/415924/course-ted-cruz-could-win-kevin-d-williamson>

Breitbart <http://www.breitbart.com/big-government/2015/03/25/cruz-vs-obamacare-itll-be-nice-to-have-a-president-who-obeys-the-law-for-a-change/>
